Features

Everything You Need to Secure Deals

From Deal Certificates to Deal Sharing — SnapProve provides complete protection for your everyday transactions.

Deal Certificate

Get an instant blockchain-timestamped certificate with GPS verification for every transaction.

Deal Share

Securely share deal proof with all parties. Both buyer and seller get verified copies.

KYC Verified Identity

Every user is verified via CNIC. Know exactly who you're dealing with.

60-Second Video Proof

Record key terms, product conditions, and identities in a guided video.

GPS Location Tagging

Every deal is stamped with precise GPS coordinates proving where it took place.

Blockchain Timestamp

Tamper-proof timestamps anchored to the blockchain ensure proof can never be altered.

How It Works

Secure Any Deal in 3 Minutes

Step 01

Verify Your Identity

30-second CNIC verification during signup. One-time process for lifetime verification.

Step 02

Record the Deal

Record a 60-second guided video showing terms, product conditions, and both parties.

Step 03

Get Deal Certificate

Receive an instant blockchain-timestamped, GPS-tagged proof certificate.

Step 04

Share & Protect

Share the Deal Certificate with all parties. Stored securely in the cloud forever.

From The Founder

Founder's Message

"

SnapProve is built to solve one core problem: lack of trust in everyday transactions.

In Pakistan and other emerging markets, millions of deals happen daily without proper proof. SnapProve makes it simple to create secure, verifiable, and court-admissible evidence within minutes using your smartphone.

Our mission is to turn informal agreements into trusted, protected transactions at scale.

— Zain Mudassar Iqbal
Founder & CEO, SnapProve
zainmudassariqbal@gmail.com

Zain Mudassar Iqbal is a Pakistan-based entrepreneur, LegalTech innovator, and founder of SnapProve.

He specializes in building technology-driven solutions focused on digital trust, blockchain verification, and AI-powered systems for emerging markets. His work with SnapProve aims to secure informal transactions by enabling KYC-verified, blockchain-backed proof for everyday deals.

With a passion for accessible justice and economic inclusion, Zain is committed to making SnapProve the standard for verified commerce across Pakistan and beyond.
